title: Form fields not updating in Result object
symptom: The form fields are filled with user input, but the Result object shows 'undefined' instead of the actual values entered.
applies_when: Next workflow is not configured correctly
not_this_if: Result object updates correctly in other workflows
root_cause: The issue arises when the Next workflow is not set up to properly update the Result object with the values from the form fields. This can happen if the workflow does not include the necessary steps to capture and assign the input values.
fix_steps: Open the workflow settings for the multi-step form
Ensure that the Next workflow includes steps to update the Result object with the form field values
Test the form again to verify that the Result object is updated correctly
agent_instruction: Check and adjust the Next workflow to ensure it updates the Result object with the form inputs.
